languages.text: "Святой Трон, мне будто раскаленные гвозди в колено вколачивают!.."

languages.text: 「聖なる御座、まるで膝に赤熱した釘を打ち込むように！」
languages.original_text: "Holy Throne, it's like they're driving red-hot nails into my knee!"

languages.text: "Kutsal Taht aşkına, sanki dizime kızgın çivi çakıyorlar!"

languages.text: “黄金王座在上！我感觉就像有烧红的钉子钉进我的膝盖！”
languages.original_text: "Holy Throne, it's like they're driving red-hot nails into my knee!"

traits.locale_text: “黄金王座在上！我感觉就像有烧红的钉子钉进我的膝盖！”

languages.text: "Heiliger Thron, das ist, als würde jemand glühende Nägel in mein Knie schlagen!"
languages.original_text: "Holy Throne, it's like they're driving red-hot nails into my knee!"

languages.text: « Par le Trône, c'est comme si on m'enfonçait des clous en fusion dans le genou à coups de marteau ! »
languages.original_text: "Holy Throne, it's like they're driving red-hot nails into my knee!"

languages.text: «¡Por el Trono, es como si me clavaran clavos al rojo en la rodilla!».
